### Product Information

- High quality coating in an aerosol can!

- Evo technology improves durability and application

- Easy to apply

- Product Code: GY-0278

- [Read full description](#product-description)

### Customer Reviews

100% of customers said that they would buy this item again

[Based upon 7 ratings](#product-reviews)

### Product Description

Gyeon CanCoat Evo takes everything we loved about the original CanCoat and enhances it! CanCoat Evo is essentially a coating in a can, designed to help you save time when protecting your paint! We all love coatings, the glossy look and durable protection they provide, but they can be time consuming to apply. CanCoat is a coating, packed into an aerosol can that you spray onto the paint, and wipe away with a clean microfiber towel. Application is really that easy and allows you to coat an entire car in around 20 minutes! The protective layer left behind helps protect the paint from UV rays, strong chemicals, bird droppings, road salt and other road grime. Its 200ml size allows you to coat or re-apply it 10 to 15 times and one coat will last up to 12 months according to the manufacturer.



Gyeon coatings have been completely redesigned and this technology has never used before in car coatings. Evo products utilize a world-first use of the fluoro-modified polisylazane technology that pushes the Evo line to the forefront of car coatings. This technology means extended durability, extreme chemical resistance, longer lasting performance, and only one layer is needed. It remains easy to apply and much easier wipe off than before.



If you are pressed for time, but do not want to sacrifice protection, grab yourself a can of the Gyeon CanCoat Evo today!



**Note:** All Evo formulas can be applied outdoors. Avoid direct sun and ideally do not get wet in the first 12 hours after application.

### Professional Detailer Reviews

Gyeon CanCoat is one of the most versatile coatings on the market. With a single product able to coat paint, trim, lights, metal, wheels, even windows, you might ask yourself, "is there anything it Can'tCoat?" Get it? Because, Can't ... you get it.

[![image](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/wp-content/uploads/2022/04/cancoat-evo-feat-300x147.jpg)](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/gyeon-cancoat-evo-review/)

- [Gyeon CanCoat Evo Review](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/gyeon-cancoat-evo-review/) by [Ian Martinez](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/author/ian-howard/)

### From The Label

#### Product Description

**Ultimate Spray & Wipe Ceramic Coating**



The easiest ceramic coating - reinvented. Hydrophobic, resistant and durable. Even easier to apply! Outdoor use allowed. Possible use on all external surfaces.



**After use, always clean the sprayer and close with a cap!**

### Customer Reviews

Reviewed by Bruce W. on 9/18/2023

[* DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

CanCoat is an easy to use product that provides some excellent hydrophobic qualities to the paint. I can't speak to its longevity yet, but it was extremely easy to apply without any issues. You spray two pumps on the included microfiber applicator/towel and wipe on the paint surface. I used very little for an entire car and had zero high spots. 



This is a great quick to use, easy to apply product that seems to offer some nice protection and added gloss. Will definitely continue to use where full ceramic coating is not desired/unavailable.

Reviewed by Fabio I. on 2/18/2023

[** DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

I have used this before on my car collection as a maintenance and for windows, super easy to apply.

Reviewed by Vincent C. on 10/19/2022

[** DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

This may be my favorite detailing product right now. I really like the idea of a 1 year or so ceramic coat, i feel no matter what you do on a daily driver its going to need a yearly light polishing(which likely removes the coating).



The application is so easy the only way to express it would to say you basically need to feel like your doing it wrong. You shoudlnt feel like your using a ceramic coat, its more like a quick detailer. Several sprays per panel and work quick and trust the process, itll work. You shouldnt see the typical ceramic residue, itll flash so fast you wont see it after a few wipes.



The hydrophobics are INSANE, gloss levels, chemical protection are off the charts and ease of use its absurd(when done right).



The price point is also major bargan. Basically $10 dollars or so per vehicle, this 1 bottle should be more like $150+.

[Read all customer reviews of Gyeon CanCoat Evo](https://www.detailedimage.com/Gyeon-M91/CanCoat-Evo-P2591/Reviews/)

[** Write your own review](https://www.detailedimage.com/Gyeon-M91/CanCoat-Evo-P2591/Reviews/#write)
